The Story

Two islands.
One voice.

Becca was born and raised in rural Nova Scotia before moving to San Pedro, Belize at 12 — spending her teenage years on the second largest barrier reef in the world, racing sailboats and captaining the Belize female national basketball team. She came back to Nova Scotia at 18 and spent years exploring the province before choosing Cape Breton Island as home. She now lives rurally on the coast with her husband Ryan and their dog Piper.

That contrast — reef to river, Caribbean to Celtic, warm to wild — is the heartbeat of everything she creates. Her content is deeply rooted in place, emotional truth, and the kind of storytelling that makes people feel something real.

As a Destination Cape Breton official ambassador, Becca brings the kind of authentic regional voice that can not be manufactured. Her content has reached over 15 million people in 90 days, not because it is optimized, but because it is real.

Coastal Living & Cape Breton Life
Foraging, fermenting, gardening, and the rhythms of life on a Cape Breton waterfront property.
Belize Identity & Dual-Island Storytelling
Her highest-converting content archetype — a story unlike any other creator telling it.
Emotional Resonance & Mindset
Quote-driven, softly aesthetic content with extraordinarily high share rates.
Nova Scotia Wildlife & Nature
Cape Breton landscapes, local wildlife, and the coastlines that define this place.

Let's Work Together

Let's build something people actually feel.

Becca partners with a small number of brands, tourism boards, and agencies at a time, chosen for genuine fit rather than volume. If this feels like the right match, the next step is simple. Reach out and let's talk about what a partnership could look like.
